posts.author: cmorris (Christopher Morris)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would greatly benefit the way I use the platform if I could make the text in description/text columns permanently wrap-able or at least toggleable. At current, the wrapping is only temporary - once you leave the board or change view it resets.

Ideally, I could set columns to wrap the text within them at a template level.

What are you trying to achieve

This feature would allow us to use boards more efficiently as RAID logs, and allow in-depth descriptions/updates to be maintained across a number of meetings. Would look a lot better when sharing with external parties also.
